themes.reasoning_notes: Triggers on your second spell each turn, rewarding spell chaining with a temporary power boost and unblockable pressure.
Its second-spell trigger grants can't be blocked, making evasion a consistent part of its combat role.
Becoming unblockable after double-spelling supports evasive damage patterns typical of low-curve tempo decks.
